description_long: This object is a large, broad-bladed sword with a geometric, angular design. The blade is straight, wide, and tapers to a pointed tip, featuring a dark metallic surface with lighter edge accents and outlined paneling. The crossguard is straight and metallic, extending horizontally with a slight upward angle at the ends, providing hand protection. The handle is cylindrical, metallic, and appears to be wrapped or textured for grip, ending in a dark, faceted pommel. The overall construction suggests a robust, heavy weapon, likely intended for two-handed use. There are no visible engravings or decorative elements, giving it a utilitarian and modern appearance.
description: A large, angular, broad-bladed sword with a straight metallic crossguard and a cylindrical, textured handle ending in a dark pommel. The blade is dark with lighter edge accents and geometric paneling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the broad, angular blade, the straight crossguard, and the cylindrical handle with a dark pommel.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, with minimal visible detail except the thickness of the blade.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the same broad blade, crossguard, and handle features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blade and handle, similar to view 1.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, metallic, lightly textured, dark faceted pommel
